message:
fix: Miscellaneous improvements across rch crates

Various small fixes and improvements:

rch-common:
- e2e/fixtures.rs: Use std::io::Result instead of anyhow::Result
- patterns.rs: Improve pattern matching with let-chain syntax
- ssh.rs: Minor cleanup
- benches/classifier.rs: Adjust benchmark configuration

rchd:
- e2e_self_test.rs: Improve test reliability

rch:
- ui/context.rs: Minor output formatting improvements

These are routine maintenance changes with no behavioral impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ impl WorkerFixture {
         Self {
             id: id.to_string(),
             host: "localhost".to_string(),
-            user: whoami::username(),
+            user: whoami::username().unwrap_or_else(|_| "unknown".to_string()),
             identity_file: "~/.ssh/id_rsa".to_string(),
             total_slots: 4,
             priority: 100,
